title: Introducing Agent Toolkit for AWS
summary: Agent Toolkit for AWS supplies AI coding agents with up-to-date AWS documentation, best practices, and tested procedures to improve agent performance and reduce errors. The toolkit integrates with AWS Lambda and API Gateway, and includes agent skills defined as Markdown runbooks, plugins, and MCP configuration for structured agent control.
